# Contributing to Refloow Geo Forensics

First off, thank you for considering contributing to Refloow Geo Forensics! Open source thrives on community collaboration.

## Intellectual Property & Copyright Assignment

To protect the integrity of the project and ensure we can continually legally maintain it, Refloow Geo Forensics requires all contributors to assign the copyright of their contributions to the project owner (Veljko Vuckovic / Refloow). 

By submitting a Pull Request, you agree to transfer the copyright of your contributed code to Refloow. This is a standard practice (used by organizations like the Free Software Foundation and Canonical) that allows us to defend the project legally and manage the license effectively.

### How to Contribute
1. Fork the repository.
2. Create a new branch (`git checkout -b feature/amazing-feature`).
3. Commit your changes (`git commit -m 'Add amazing feature'`).
4. Push to the branch (`git push origin feature/amazing-feature`).
5. Open a Pull Request.

*Note: Upon opening your first Pull Request, you will be prompted by our automated bot to sign the Contributor License Agreement (CLA).*
